name: packy-image-desktop
description: Desktop image client for GPT Image compatible APIs.
author: OpenAI Codex

scripts.test:desktop: npm run verify && npm run smoke:ui && npm run smoke:gallery
scripts.verify: node --check main.js && node --check core/app-storage.js && node --check core/auto-updater.js && node --check core/endpoints.js && node --check core/generation-service.js && node --check core/generation.js && node --check core/http-client.js && node --check core/image-api.js && node --check core/image-results.js && node --check core/models-service.js && node --check core/reference-images.js && node --check core/reference-prompt-api.js && node --check renderer/app-config.js && node --check renderer/canvas-workbench.js && node --check renderer/image-inspector.js && node --check renderer/prompt-library.js && node --check renderer/renderer.js && node tools/verify-generation-rules.js && node tools/verify-reference-images.js && node tools/verify-reference-prompt.js && node tools/verify-project-structure.js
